FAQ

Common Questions

Typically 30–60 days from kickoff to launch depending on scope. Simple landing pages can be done in 2–3 weeks. We share a detailed timeline at project kickoff so you always know where things stand.

We think in systems, not pages. Every project starts with your business goals, and everything we build — website, AI, SEO, automation — is engineered to achieve those specific outcomes.

Yes. We offer maintenance plans covering updates, monitoring, security patches, performance optimization, and content updates. We're a long-term partner, not just a vendor.

Absolutely. We audit, redesign, migrate, or optimize existing sites. Many clients come to us for complete overhauls of sites that aren't generating results.

Healthcare, finance, education, e-commerce, real estate, restaurants, consulting, startups, and service businesses. If you have customers, we can build a system to attract and convert them.

About Kritexa Labs · Est. 2026

We Think in
Systems,
Not Pages

Most agencies build websites. Kritexa Labs engineers complete digital growth machines — AI-powered systems that attract leads, automate operations, and scale revenue automatically.

🎯

Our Mission

To engineer AI-first digital growth systems that help every Indian business — from local clinics to fast-growing startups — compete on the internet and win.

🔭

Our Vision

A world where every business has access to enterprise-grade AI and automation — regardless of size, budget, or technical expertise. Intelligence as infrastructure.

Our Values

Dedicated to Delivering
Value Every Day

🤖

AI First, Always

Every solution we build has intelligence at its core. Automation isn't a feature — it's the foundation we build every system on.

🎯

Outcomes Over Outputs

We measure success in leads generated, revenue grown, and hours saved — not just websites launched or code shipped.

🔍

Radical Transparency

No hidden costs, no vague timelines, no jargon. We tell you exactly what we're building, why, and what results to expect.

⚡

Speed Without Shortcuts

We move fast but never cut corners on quality. A product launched wrong is always worse than one launched right and slightly late.

🛡️

Security First

Every system we ship is hardened with best-in-class security practices — your client data and business infrastructure, fully protected.

🤝

Partnership, Not Vendorship

We treat every client's business like our own. Your growth is our growth. Your problems are the problems we wake up to solve.

Join Our Team

Build the Future With Us

We're looking for passionate builders who want to work on real problems, ship real products, and grow alongside a company shaping India's digital future.

View Open Roles →
Life at Kritexa Labs

Why Build With Us?

🚀

Real Projects, Day One

No tutorials, no fake work. You'll ship to production from your first week on live client projects.

🤖

AI-First Environment

Work with the latest AI tools daily — Claude, GPT-4, Cursor, n8n. We stay ahead so you do too.

📈

Grow With the Company

Revenue sharing, performance bonuses, and skill-based increments. Our growth is your growth.

🌐

Remote-First Culture

Work from anywhere in India. Flexible hours, async-first, results over attendance always.

🎓

Mentorship & Growth

Weekly learning sessions, code reviews, direct mentorship from the founding team.

💡

Ideas Welcome

Your ideas matter. We experiment fast, iterate openly, and reward creative thinking at every level.

Open Positions

Current Openings

Hiring for one position now. More will open as we grow.

Sales & Growth Actively Hiring
Full-Time / Part-Time📍 Remote · India
📢
Business Development Executive
BDE — Lead Generation · Appointment Setting · Sales Closing
About the Role

High-energy, results-driven BDE who can identify growth opportunities, build pipelines, and close deals for our web development, AI automation, and digital growth services. You'll be the face of Kritexa Labs to potential clients — driving early revenue and shaping how businesses across India discover us.

🎯
Core Skills
  • Lead Generation
  • Appointment Setting
  • Sales Closing
  • Pipeline Management
  • Client Relationships
📋
Responsibilities
  • Identify & qualify leads daily
  • Book discovery calls
  • Present services & close deals
  • Maintain CRM records
  • Report weekly pipeline
🛠️
Tools You'll Use
  • LinkedIn Sales Navigator
  • WhatsApp Business
  • Cold Email Outreach
  • CRM (Zoho / HubSpot)
  • Google Meet / Zoom

Common Questions

30–60 days typically. Simple landing pages in 2–3 weeks. We share a detailed timeline at kickoff so you always know what's happening and when.
